mapper.sql: id, work_id, password, nickname, sex, birthday, phone, email, entry_date, dept_id, address, status, create_time, update_time, role
mapper.insert: insert into t_employee (id, work_id, password, nickname, sex, birthday, phone, email, entry_date, dept_id, address, status, create_time, update_time, role) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_employee
id,
work_id,
password,
nickname,
sex,
birthday,
phone,
email,
entry_date,
dept_id,
address,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
role,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
#{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{role,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_employee
work_id = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
phone = #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
entry_date = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE},
dept_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
role = #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_employee set work_id = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, phone = #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_date = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, dept_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, role = #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select * from t_employee where dept_id = #{categoryId} order by create_time desc
select count(id) from t_employee where dept_id = #{categoryId}
